calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Rhonda Fung. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-17-2003 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2003 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jan-06-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-14-2003 Continued To Oct-21-03 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 502

Quiet Title - Real Property, In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-16-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: V. Mack/S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Joshua A. Rosenthal, Esq. for Plaintiff Giampaolo Boschetti also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the oral and documentary evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff, Giampaolo Boschetti and against the defendant, Marcial Reyes as the sole owner of fee simple title to the real property of 317 Leavenworth, San Francisco, CA. (See scanned JUDGMENT for details of property).
Judgment signed in open court.
